meta.purpose: Curated memorial gift vendors for portal keepsakes — USA vendors only; no affiliate links, no paid placement
meta.disclaimer: USA vendors only. Mourning Guide does not sell these products or endorse any vendor. Prices are approximate — confirm on each website. Read recent reviews before purchasing.

Memory bears.name: The Patchwork Bear
Memory bears.description: Handmade memory and bereavement bears crafted from a loved one's clothing — one of the original US memory bear studios since 2003.
Memory bears.process: Order online; mail clothing per kit instructions; team confirms receipt and sends updates; optional scraps returned.
Memory bears.turnaround: Several weeks depending on product; check current lead times at checkout
Memory bears.tip: Bereavement Bear product line is designed for loss; Oprah's Favorite Things alum with 1,000+ reviews.

Memory bears.name: ReMinkie Memory Bears
Memory bears.description: Jointed memory bears from clothing, fur coats, neckties, and fabrics — also pillows, throws, and keepsake quilts.
Memory bears.process: Call or email after sending fabric; Rita Glosser and team consult on design; monogram personalization available.
Memory bears.turnaround: Varies by project — confirm timeline when ordering
Memory bears.tip: Strong option for fur, ties, or heirloom fabrics; bears are fully lined with movable arms and legs.

Memory bears.name: Vicki's Memory Bears
Memory bears.description: One-of-a-kind bears from shirts, dresses, uniforms, and linens — bereavement and heirloom commissions since 2002.
Memory bears.process: Email vicki@vickismemorybears.com with clothing description and wishes; ship items to PO Box in Hartville, OH.
Memory bears.tip: Can preserve fabric scent if not laundered; also offers custom pencil portraits from photos.

Memory bears.name: The Unlimited Stitch
Memory bears.description: Handcrafted memory bears from shirts, pajamas, uniforms, and baby clothes — bereavement and sympathy gifts.
Memory bears.process: Order online; download instruction sheet; mail clothing to Morton, IL studio with waterproof packaging.
Memory bears.tip: Contact them if time-sensitive for a memorial service — they may accommodate when possible.

Memory bears.name: Sew Much Love Memory Bears
Memory bears.description: Custom bereavement and memory bears from clothing — shirts, sweaters, baby outfits, and military uniforms.
Memory bears.process: Complete order form; mail clothing with order number; maker contacts you if fabric needs clarification.
Memory bears.tip: Ask about rush options if you need bears before a memorial service.

Memory bears.name: TammyBears
Memory bears.description: Heirloom-quality jointed memory bears from wedding dresses, uniforms, shirts, and sentimental fabrics since 1999.
Memory bears.process: Email or contact form with garment details; collaborate on design; ship clothing per instructions.
Memory bears.turnaround: Several weeks — confirm current wait list
Memory bears.tip: Fully jointed head, arms, and legs — bears sit well for display on a bed or chair.

Ashes jewelry.name: Spirit Pieces
Ashes jewelry.description: Handmade glass and resin cremation jewelry infused with a small portion of ashes — pendants, rings, and orbs.
Ashes jewelry.process: Order online; free ash collection kit shipped; return kit via USPS Priority Express (cremains regulations); artist crafts piece.
Ashes jewelry.turnaround: About 6 weeks after kit is received
Ashes jewelry.tip: Uses only a pinch of ashes — rest stays with family; family discounts on multiple pieces.

Ashes jewelry.name: Close By Me Jewelry
Ashes jewelry.description: Sterling silver and 14k gold memorial jewelry with ashes solidified into a custom center stone — modern, wearable designs.
Ashes jewelry.process: Order online; ash kit provided; ashes bonded into jewelry in CA studio using patented process.
Ashes jewelry.tip: Premium option — ashes become the stone itself, not a hollow compartment.

Ashes jewelry.name: Sugarberry Memorials
Ashes jewelry.description: Custom cremation rings and necklaces with lab-created gemstones infused with ashes, hair, fabric, or flower petals.
Ashes jewelry.process: Browse designs; consultation for custom work; ash kit shipped; handcrafted to order.
Ashes jewelry.turnaround: Varies by design — confirm at order
Ashes jewelry.tip: Also accepts fabric, hair, soil, and petals — not ashes only.

Ashes jewelry.name: Eternally Connected
Ashes jewelry.description: Affordable cremation ash pendants and keepsake jewelry — entry-level option for families on a budget.
Ashes jewelry.process: Order online; kit for small ash portion; fill pendant at home or send to vendor per product type.
Ashes jewelry.tip: Lower price point than custom glass art — good for multiple family members.

Ashes jewelry.name: Urns.com — Cremation Jewelry
Ashes jewelry.description: Large selection of urn pendants, rings, and bracelets with secure ash chambers — fill at home with included kit.
Ashes jewelry.process: Choose style; order ships with filling tools and instructions; place ashes in chamber yourself.
Ashes jewelry.tip: Hollow-compartment style (not fused glass) — wide style range including masculine designs.

Ashes jewelry.name: LifeGem
Ashes jewelry.description: Memorial diamonds grown from cremation ashes or hair — the only US-based memorial diamond production lab.
Ashes jewelry.process: Call 866-543-3436 for free shipping kit; send ashes or hair via US Priority Mail to Illinois lab; diamond created and set in chosen jewelry.
Ashes jewelry.tip: Premium heirloom option — lab tours available in Chicago; verify process details before committing.

Memorial candles.name: Afterlights
Memorial candles.description: Personalized memorial candles with name, dates, photo, or message — soy wax with custom label designs.
Memorial candles.process: Choose label layout (photo, text, or date); personalize online; shipped ready to light.
Memorial candles.tip: Strong sympathy-gift option — photo label fills entire front of candle.

Memorial candles.name: Remember Me Gifts
Memorial candles.description: Personalized LED and wax memorial candles with names, dates, and verses — hurricane holders and pillar styles.
Memorial candles.process: Select design; enter name and dates; ships with LED or wax candle inside holder.
Memorial candles.tip: LED options safe for hospitals, nursing homes, and long display at services.

Memorial candles.name: The Funeral Program Site
Memorial candles.description: Memorial candles in wax, LED, and glass — personalized with photo, name, dates, and messages for services or home.
Memorial candles.process: Choose candle type; customize online; rush shipping available for services.
Memorial candles.turnaround: Fast shipping options for funeral timelines
Memorial candles.tip: Same vendor as funeral programs — convenient if family already uses them for service stationery.

Memorial candles.name: Memorialine
Memorial candles.description: Soy scented memorial candles with name, dates, or message — includes complimentary digital memorial page via QR code.
Memorial candles.process: Personalize text online; candle ships with QR-linked virtual tribute page.
Memorial candles.tip: Digital memorial page lets visitors share photos and stories — pairs physical and online tribute.

Memorial candles.name: Personalization Mall
Memorial candles.description: In-memory candle gifts with engraved or printed names and dates — widely available mainstream option.
Memorial candles.process: Search "memorial candle"; personalize; standard e-commerce checkout.
Memorial candles.tip: Good last-minute option when funeral is soon — verify delivery date at checkout.

Memorial candles.name: Laurelbox
Memorial candles.description: Hand-poured soy memorial candles with engraved or printed names — sympathy-focused US gift company.
Memorial candles.process: Choose candle; add loved one's name for engraving or label; ships in signature gift packaging.
Memorial candles.turnaround: 3–5 business days for engraved orders; standard shipping 4–8 business days
Memorial candles.tip: Sympathy-gift specialist — eco-friendly soy wax, no dyes; popular for bereavement care packages.

Memorial garden stones.name: Engraved Garden Stones
Memorial garden stones.description: Natural river rock, bluestone, and granite memorial stones — sandblasted engraving with digital proof approval.
Memorial garden stones.process: Choose stone size; enter text; approve digital proof; free US shipping; stone arrives ready to place.
Memorial garden stones.tip: Proof-before-engrave workflow — nothing cut until you approve layout.

Memorial garden stones.name: Memorial Rocks
Memorial garden stones.description: Natural river rock memorial stones for people and pets — deep engraving on one-of-a-kind stones since 2012.
Memorial garden stones.process: Select product; customize text; artisan selects matching river rock; free US shipping.
Memorial garden stones.tip: Each stone is unique natural rock — size and color vary slightly.

Memorial garden stones.name: Adirondack Stone Works
Memorial garden stones.description: Large bluestone stepping stones and garden memorials — up to four lines of text on 13–14 inch stones.
Memorial garden stones.process: Design online; engraved natural bluestone shipped with free shipping.
Memorial garden stones.tip: Popular for garden paths and memorial stepping stones at home.

Memorial garden stones.name: Design-a-Stone
Memorial garden stones.description: Cast concrete engraved memorial and address stones — weatherproof monument-grade finish with ground stake.
Memorial garden stones.process: Design your own text layout; ships within about 4 business days for standard designs.
Memorial garden stones.tip: Concrete cast stones — uniform shape vs natural river rock; good for formal garden beds.

Memorial garden stones.name: Urn Garden
Memorial garden stones.description: Cast-stone memorial stepping stones, plaques, and garden markers — weatherproof and customizable with names and dates.
Memorial garden stones.process: Choose design; add personalization; ships as plaque or stepping stone.
Memorial garden stones.tip: American-made cast stone — indoor or outdoor display.

Memorial garden stones.name: Memorials.com — Garden Stones
Memorial garden stones.description: Memorial garden stones, benches, and plaques with engraved names, dates, and verses.
Memorial garden stones.process: Browse garden memorial section; customize online; standard shipping.
Memorial garden stones.tip: Wide catalog — compare stone material (cast vs natural) before ordering.

Custom portrait.name: 1st Art Gallery
Custom portrait.description: Hand-painted custom oil and charcoal portraits from photos — free proofs and unlimited revisions.
Custom portrait.process: Upload photo; choose medium and size; receive proof before shipping; 365-day satisfaction guarantee.
Custom portrait.tip: Can combine multiple photos into one memorial portrait — request in order notes.

Custom portrait.name: Paintru
Custom portrait.description: Museum-quality hand-painted memorial oil portraits from photos — combine multiple people from separate photos.
Custom portrait.process: Select portrait type; upload photos; matched with artist; proof and revision process.
Custom portrait.tip: Concierge can help combine family photos with deceased loved one — chat before ordering.

Custom portrait.name: Snappy Canvas
Custom portrait.description: Hand-painted and digitally brushed memorial portrait paintings on canvas — oil-finish and watercolor styles.
Custom portrait.process: Upload photo; choose size and style; artist creates; e-proof for approval before shipping.
Custom portrait.tip: Can order before photo is ready — email image later to support.

Custom portrait.name: Welham & Co
Custom portrait.description: Custom memorial portraits printed and framed in the US — pay after approving digital proof.
Custom portrait.process: Upload photo; free proof in 1–3 days; unlimited edits; pay only when satisfied; framed print shipped.
Custom portrait.turnaround: Proof in 1–3 days; print 1–2 weeks after approval
Custom portrait.tip: $0 upfront model — cancel during review if not satisfied.

Custom portrait.name: Picture It On Canvas
Custom portrait.description: Custom canvas prints and photo portraits from digital files — US print lab with memorial and sympathy options.
Custom portrait.process: Upload photo; choose canvas size and finish; printed and shipped from Minnesota.
Custom portrait.tip: Budget-friendly printed option vs hand-painted — good for multiple family copies.

Custom portrait.name: CanvasPeople
Custom portrait.description: Photo-to-canvas memorial prints — US-based print studio with frequent promotions.
Custom portrait.process: Upload photo; select canvas dimensions; ships from US facility.
Custom portrait.tip: Check sales — useful when several siblings each want the same portrait.

Fingerprint jewelry.name: Legacy Touch
Fingerprint jewelry.description: Fingerprint pendants, rings, charms, and cremation-fingerprint jewelry — widely used by funeral homes.
Fingerprint jewelry.process: Upload fingerprint image or use Print PIN from funeral home; customize metal and chain; handcrafted engraving.
Fingerprint jewelry.turnaround: 1–2 weeks; 24-hour express available on many items
Fingerprint jewelry.tip: Ask funeral director if they have Legacy Touch fingerprint kit — saves re-capturing print.

Fingerprint jewelry.name: Thumbies
Fingerprint jewelry.description: Original fingerprint keepsake jewelry since 1998 — lost-wax casting preserves fine print detail; sold via funeral home partners.
Fingerprint jewelry.process: Often ordered through funeral home that captured print; families can also order direct with print on file.
Fingerprint jewelry.tip: If funeral home is a partner, print stays on file for future anniversary orders.

Fingerprint jewelry.name: Thumbprint Keepsakes
Fingerprint jewelry.description: Fingerprint pendants, keychains, and memorial jewelry — direct-to-family alternative to funeral home programs.
Fingerprint jewelry.process: Order fingerprint kit or upload ink print; select jewelry style; shipped engraved.
Fingerprint jewelry.tip: Budget-friendly alternative if Legacy Touch or Thumbies styles don't fit.

Fingerprint jewelry.name: Jewelry Keepsakes
Fingerprint jewelry.description: Memorial thumbprint pendants and fingerprint jewelry — free ink kit shipped; upload print photo online.
Fingerprint jewelry.process: Order online; receive fingerprint kit; upload image or email sales@jewelrykeepsakes.com; ships in 24–48 hours after processing.
Fingerprint jewelry.turnaround: 1–3 business days shipping after print received
Fingerprint jewelry.tip: Fast turnaround — good when funeral is soon and you already have a clear print.

Fingerprint jewelry.name: EvrMemories
Fingerprint jewelry.description: Made-to-order fingerprint pendants and rings — popular styles for men and women; hand-polished after engraving.
Fingerprint jewelry.process: Choose style; upload fingerprint image or request kit; made to order in USA.
Fingerprint jewelry.turnaround: 1–2 business days after print received (rings ~5 days)
Fingerprint jewelry.tip: Popular styles page helps when family is overwhelmed by choices.

Fingerprint jewelry.name: Memory Forge Jewelry
Fingerprint jewelry.description: Custom fingerprint and handwriting memorial jewelry in sterling silver and gold — rings, pendants, and cuffs.
Fingerprint jewelry.process: Capture print via kit or high-res photo; approve digital mockup; handcrafted and shipped from US.
Fingerprint jewelry.tip: Handwriting memorial options available on the same order.
